title: JavaScript Boolean Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties and tools for creating robust and cross-browser web experiences with boolean logic.

questions.question: Which of these is the most modern and recommended way to build a professional-grade web application in JavaScript for handling 'is-logged-in' states?
options: Using Boolean data types (true or false) to represent On-Off states.

questions.question: Which of these is a major 'Pro' of using a Boolean shorthand (e.g., if (isActive) instead of if (isActive === true))?
options: It makes your HTML files smaller and more readable.
It is much cleaner, more concise, and is preferred by professional developers.
It is always supported by every browser.
It replaces the need for any HTML5 tags.

questions.question: What is 'Truthy' inside a professional web application boolean calculation?
options: To make the site load much faster.
A value that is treated as true in a boolean context (like a string with content or a non-zero number).
To choose the colors for the animation.

questions.question: Which of these is considered a 'Falsy' value in JavaScript (it is treated as false)?
options: All of these are Falsy values.

questions.question: Which Logical operator returns 'true' IF at least ONE comparison is true?
